report.summary: UX audit of 5 newly published/queued pages; fixed broken ArticleStructuredData props on Sui and Portfolio Rebalancing guides, replaced 3 missing static OG image refs with dynamic /api/og, fixed breadcrumb inconsistency, added BackToTop navigation to 5 long-scroll guides, created 5 SVG social cards.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed ArticleStructuredData on /learn/sui-blockchain-guide-2026: replaced incorrect publishedTime/author props with required datePublished/dateModified/slug (was generating broken JSON-LD schema)

Fixed ArticleStructuredData on /learn/crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026: replaced incorrect publishedDate/author props with required datePublished/dateModified/slug, fixed image URL from degen0x.io to degen0x.com
Fixed breadcrumb on Portfolio Rebalancing guide: removed extra 'Home' level and href='#' to match site-wide 2-level pattern (Learn → Title)
Added BackToTop component to /learn/bitcoin-liquid-staking-tokens-guide-2026 for long-scroll navigation
Added BackToTop component to /learn/cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026 for long-scroll navigation
Added BackToTop component to /learn/dao-governance-voting-guide-2026 for long-scroll navigation
Added BackToTop component to /learn/sui-blockchain-guide-2026 for long-scroll navigation
Added BackToTop component to /learn/crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026 for long-scroll navigation

sections.title: OG Image Fixes
items: Fixed /learn/bitcoin-liquid-staking-tokens-guide-2026: OG + Twitter images pointed to nonexistent /og-bitcoin-lst-guide.png → switched to dynamic /api/og?type=learn endpoint
Fixed /learn/bitcoin-liquid-staking-tokens-guide-2026: generateArticleSchema image also pointed to missing static file → switched to dynamic /api/og
Fixed /learn/sui-blockchain-guide-2026: ArticleStructuredData image pointed to nonexistent og-sui-guide-2026.jpg → switched to dynamic /api/og
Fixed /learn/crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026: ArticleStructuredData image pointed to degen0x.io (wrong domain) nonexistent .jpg → switched to dynamic /api/og
Added missing Twitter images array to Bitcoin LST guide metadata (was missing, causing no Twitter card image)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: SVG social card: og-bitcoin-lst-guide.svg (1200x630) — BTC orange/gold theme, protocol comparison cards (LBTC, SolvBTC, pumpBTC), $4B+ TVL badge
SVG social card: og-dao-governance-guide.svg (1200x630) — purple/cyan governance theme, stat cards (50,845+ DAOs, $13.6B treasuries, 28% participation)
SVG social card: og-cross-chain-interop-guide.svg (1200x630) — cyan/purple interop theme, Big Four protocol cards with key metrics, decorative chain links
SVG social card: og-sui-blockchain-guide.svg (1200x630) — Sui cyan theme, Mysticeti/TVL/Move stat cards, Layer 1 badge
SVG social card: og-portfolio-rebalancing-guide.svg (1200x630) — green/blue balanced theme, strategy cards, decorative pie chart allocation graphic
